title: Pyria system

{{Quote|Borleias—rather, the Pyria system—is an important hyperspace crossroads, the convenient intersection of a lot of routes, it's on a lot of people's nav computers.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="EL1RD" />}}
The '''Pyria system''', also known as the '''Borleias system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]],<ref name="EAOC" /> at the edge of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. Centered on the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Pyria]], it included the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] and [[Pyria VI]], the [[Blackmoon]], and the [[Versieds]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]]. It was located only hours from the [[Mirit system/Legends|Mirit]] and [[Venjagga system/Legends|Venjagga]] systems.

The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] code-named it the '''Blackmoon system''' and '''Phenaru system'''.

==History==
In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' expedition traveled through the system on its voyage from [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].<ref name="TEA" />

The system's fourth planet and only inhabited world was Borleias. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was the base of operations for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Evir Derricote|Derricote]]. After the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] routed the Imperials, it fortified Borleias as a forward base even as ships sent by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] began making reconnaissance raids into the system.

In [[27 ABY/Legends|27.5 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Borleias served as a New Republic fortress. Its [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; First)|loss]] led to the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. The system was later the site of a significant [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|battle]], which saw the annihilation of a large Yuuzhan Vong contingent including the [[Domain Hul]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] and consequently a morally important New Republic victory.

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] offered the system to the [[Imperial Remnant]] if they supported the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] at the [[Second Battle of Fondor]].
